content.description: The transcript-capture requirement is satisfied by the changes in commit 554998c (implements exclusive-access). Both on_stop.sh and on_pre_compact.sh were updated to call artifact.sh capture-transcript instead of doing direct filesystem copies. The capture-transcript command atomically stores an Artifact<StagedTranscript> JSON plus a companion JSONL file. on_stop.sh uses captureType=primary and on_pre_compact.sh uses captureType=precompact. Both hooks correctly exclude non-interactive agent types. Assessment was taken before the fix was committed.
